stdout:
Table	Create Table
contracts_with_space	CREATE TABLE `contracts_with_space` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `spaceId` int NOT NULL,
  `contractId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `fk_1` (`spaceId`),
  KEY `fk_2` (`contractId`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`spaceId`) REFERENCES `consumable_spaces` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`contractId`) REFERENCES `contracts` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `contracts_with_space_spaceId_contract_spaces_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`spaceId`) REFERENCES `contract_spaces` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
